zh.lifeSummary: 當John Thomas Thorolde於1444年出生在英國素福爾可恩哈姆 馬尼亞時，他的父親Richard Thorold jr14歲，母親Isabel Brehaugh20歲。他於1462年與Alice Annie Staunton在英國英格蘭素福爾可恩哈姆 馬尼亞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年在他的家鄉享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可恩哈姆 馬尼亞。

nameMeanings.name: Thorolde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urold, T(h)orold, T(h)orald (Old Scandinavian Þóraldr). The initial T is due to the Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Th-. Torald and Torold became Toraud and Toroud, giving the modern surname Torode. This name may have become confused with Tyrrell , Turrill , and Torrell .

variants.name: Tyrrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Torrell
meanings: 1 English: (i) nickname from Old French torel ‘young bull’. See also Torr . Some of the bearers below may belong under (2). (ii) variant of Turrell .
2 English: locative name for someone who lived or worked at a lime kiln or a malt kiln (Middle English torel, Old French toraile ‘little tower, kiln’).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Thomas Thorolde was born in 1444, in Thornham Magna, Suffolk, England, his father, Richard Thorold jr, was 14 and his mother, Isabel Brehaugh, was 20. He married Alice Annie Staunton in 1462, in Thornham Magna, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1538, in his hometown, at the age of 94, and was buried in Thornham Magna, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Thomas Thorolde est né en 1444, à Thornham Magna, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Thorold jr, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Isabel Brehaugh, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Annie Staunton en 1462, à Thornham Magna, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1538, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterré à Thornham Magna, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Thomas Thoroldeが1444年にイギリススフォルクソルンハム マグナで生まれた時，父Richard Thorold jrは14歳，母Isabel Brehaughは20歳であった。1462年にイギリスイギリススフォルクソルンハム マグナでAlice Annie Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年に故郷で94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクソルンハム マグナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Thomas Thorolde(이)가 1444년 영국 수폴크 토른함 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Thorold jr(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Brehaugh(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 토른함 매그나에서 Alice Annie Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 그의 고향에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 토른함 매그나에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Thomas Thorolde родился в 1444 г. в местности таурнам магна, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Thorold jr было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Brehaugh, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Annie Staunton в 1462 г. в местности таурнам магна, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1538 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 94 лет и был похоронен в местности таурнам магна, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
